LSE-HS12-L4-1400P-HSCE-PIN-GBL-02 • HS Civics & Economics Grade 12 • Landmark U.S. Supreme Court Interpretations • Podcast Interview • Global Perspectives

The Civic Hour

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a teacher. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was Mr. Asante's main point about the Supreme Court?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the teacher says the Supreme Court has shaped, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says about the Court and about other countries' high courts, and articulate the conclusion that follows about American rights on the global stage.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CA HSS 12.5  |  HS Civics & Economics Grade 12: Landmark U.S. Supreme Court Interpretations
